author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Single-source extension manifest and policy examples in docs

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: docs/EXTENSIONS.md embeds extension manifest and policy examples that duplicate runnable example files. Manifest v2 provenance/sandbox/permissions/capabilities examples appear in docs/EXTENSIONS.md:145-170 and docs/examples/policy-restricted-extension/manifest.json:1-21 plus docs/examples/starter-extension/manifest.json:1-32; policy config examples appear in docs/EXTENSIONS.md:193-217 and docs/examples/policy-restricted-extension/README.md:26-59. Existing pm-w98k covers source-code extension contract constants and pm-axd1 covers production/test default objects, not docs/example snippet drift.

docs/EXTENSIONS.md either links to runnable example manifests/configs or embeds snippets generated/checked from those files; extension example docs no longer drift from runnable files; docs-skills gate and example/package checks pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'extension manifest policy examples docs EXTENSIONS policy-restricted starter manifest duplicated' found adjacent pm-w98k/pm-axd1 but no active item for docs/example snippet duplication.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for extension docs examples
